Notes: Tamil Nadu Newsprint and Papers Limited. Government-backed buyer. Accepts office-grade and newsprint. Requires minimum 500 kg per delivery.
ITC's managed paper recycling initiative. Best per-kg rate in dataset. Accepts mixed office paper. Has collection centre near Perungudi.
Private recycler based in Tambaram. Accepts mixed grades. Transport cost disadvantage due to distance.
Small-scale informal aggregator near Velachery. Best distance but lowest price. Limited capacity.
Mid-scale recycler near Sholinganallur. Moderate price and distance. Suitable for smaller volumes.
Certified recycler with ISO 14001. Accepts all paper grades including cardboard. Slightly lower price than ITC but closer.
General waste paper trader. Inconsistent pricing. Distance advantage partially offset by lower rate.
